title: Next-generation brain observatories.
author_string: Koch, Christof, Svoboda, Karel, Bernard, Amy, Basso, Michele A, Churchland, Anne K et al.
abstract: We propose centralized brain observatories for large-scale recordings of neural activity in mice and non-human primates coupled with cloud-based data analysis and sharing. Such observatories will advance reproducible systems neuroscience and democratize access to the most advanced tools and data.
